id.about-intro: Saya Muhammad Adrian, Lulusan SMK Jurusan Rekayasa Perangkat Lunak.
id.about-desc2: Saya lulusan SMK jurusan Rekayasa Perangkat Lunak yang memadukan ketelitian teknis dengan solusi digital yang kreatif. Dengan dasar yang kuat dalam manajemen data operasional dan pemantauan real-time, saya memastikan akurasi serta efisiensi di setiap sistem yang saya bangun. Keahlian utama saya adalah mengembangkan situs web modern, serta terus mengeksplorasi dan mengintegrasikan teknologi terkini. Selain itu, saya juga memiliki kemampuan di bidang desain grafis dan editing video. Saya antusias dalam mewujudkan konsep visual menjadi konten yang menarik, baik dalam bentuk gambar, ilustrasi, maupun potongan video.
id.project-1-desc: Website profil pribadi yang dirancang menggunakan Google Sites sebagai proyek awal belajar pengembangan web. Saya belajar menyusun struktur informasi, menata konten secara rapi, serta memahami pentingnya pengalaman pengguna dalam membangun sebuah website.
id.project-2-desc: Platform manajemen perpustakaan digital berbasis web yang memungkinkan eksplorasi katalog buku, pencarian judul, serta pengelolaan koleksi. Dibangun dengan framework Laravel dan database MySQL. Melatih pemahaman arsitektur MVC, routing, dan autentikasi dasar pengguna.
id.project-3-desc: Aplikasi Point of Sale berbasis web untuk mengelola transaksi penjualan, inventaris barang, dan laporan pendapatan. Fitur utama meliputi input transaksi, pencarian produk, perhitungan otomatis, serta pencetakan struk sederhana untuk simulasi usaha retail.
id.project-4-desc: Berhasil mengimplementasikan script otomatisasi import data Excel pada platform iBoss untuk mengoptimalkan efisiensi kerja. Proses input data yang sebelumnya manual dan memakan waktu kini berjalan otomatis, cepat, dan akurat. Berperan aktif dalam mempercepat alur kerja tim secara signifikan.
id.cert-1-title: Sertifikat Magang PT Jala Lintas Media
id.cert-1-desc: Sertifikat tanda bukti telah menyelesaikan program magang sebagai Staff Dismantle dengan meraih penghargaan Best Performance Staff Dismantle periode 2024-2025.
id.cert-2-desc: Dokumen resmi yang menerangkan kontribusi nyata dalam pemantauan data operasional, penggunaan platform iBOSS, serta validasi perangkat.
id.cert-3-desc: Sertifikasi kompetensi resmi dari Badan Nasional Sertifikasi Profesi (BNSP) yang menyatakan status kompeten dalam skema pekerjaan Programmer.
id.cert-4-desc: Sertifikat pencapaian penguasaan Bahasa Inggris berdasarkan standar Test of English for International Communication (TOEIC) - CECRL.
id.cert-5-desc: Juara 2 lomba Web Jurnalistik memperingati Hari Pers Nasional 9 Februari 2023.
id.cert-6-desc: Juara 2 Lomba Video Inspiratif memperingati Hari Pendidikan Nasional 2 Mei 2023.
id.contact-cta-desc: Saya terbuka untuk peluang kerja sama, kolaborasi, atau sekadar berdiskusi. Silakan tinggalkan pesan!
id.form-submit-error: Gagal mengirim pesan. Silakan coba lagi.

en.about-intro: I am Muhammad Adrian, a Vocational High School Graduate majoring in Software Engineering.
en.about-desc2: I am a vocational high school graduate majoring in Software Engineering who combines technical precision with creative digital solutions. With a strong foundation in operational data management and real-time monitoring, I ensure accuracy and efficiency in every system I build. My main expertise lies in developing modern websites, as well as continuously exploring and integrating the latest technologies. In addition, I also have skills in graphic design and video editing. I am enthusiastic about transforming visual concepts into engaging content, whether in the form of images, illustrations, or video cuts.
en.project-1-desc: Personal profile website designed using Google Sites as an initial project to learn web development. I learned to structure information, arrange content neatly, and understand the importance of user experience in building a website.
en.project-2-desc: Web-based digital library management platform that allows book catalog exploration, title searching, and collection management. Built with Laravel framework and MySQL database. Trained understanding of MVC architecture, routing, and basic user authentication.
en.project-3-desc: Web-based Point of Sale application to manage sales transactions, product inventory, and revenue reports. Key features include transaction input, product search, automatic calculation, and simple receipt printing for retail business simulation.
en.project-4-desc: Successfully implemented an Excel data import automation script on the iBoss platform to optimize work efficiency. The data input process, which was previously manual and time-consuming, now runs automatically, fast, and accurately. Played an active role in significantly speeding up the team's workflow.
en.cert-1-title: Internship Certificate PT Jala Lintas Media
en.cert-1-desc: Certificate of proof of completing the internship program as Staff Dismantle, achieving the 'Best Performance Staff Dismantle' award for the 2024-2025 period.
en.cert-2-desc: Official document stating active contribution in operational data monitoring, iBOSS platform usage, and device validation.
en.cert-3-desc: Official competency certification from the National Professional Certification Agency (BNSP) declaring competent status in the Programmer job scheme.
en.cert-4-desc: Certificate of English proficiency achievement based on the Test of English for International Communication (TOEIC) - CECRL standards.
en.cert-5-desc: 2nd place in the Web Journalism competition commemorating National Press Day, February 9, 2023.
en.cert-6-desc: 2nd place in the Inspiring Video competition commemorating National Education Day, May 2, 2023.
en.contact-cta-desc: I am open for collaboration opportunities, joint projects, or just discussing. Please leave a message!
en.form-submit-error: Failed to send message. Please try again.
